zh.lifeSummary: Henry Savile是Sir John Savile和Isabel Eland的兒子，出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭。他於1371年與Elizabeth de Thornhill在英國越可爾恩爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1412年在英國英格蘭，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United: 英国英格兰史洛普爾其其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Savile是Sir John Savile和Isabel Eland的儿子，出生在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭。他于1371年与Elizabeth de Thornhill在英国越可爾恩爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1412年在英国英格兰，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Savile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Saville
meanings: English (of Norman origin; Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in northern France of which the identity is not clear, though it is probably Sainville in Eure-et-Loire, so called from Old French saisne ‘Saxon’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Savel , Savell , and Savelle .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Savile was born in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir John Savile and Isabel Eland. He married Elizabeth de Thornhill in 1371, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1412, in England, United Kingdom, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Savile est né à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Sir John Savile et Isabel Eland. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Thornhill en 1371, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1412, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Henry Savile wurde in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Sir John Savile und Isabel Eland geboren. Er hat 1371 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England Elizabeth de Thornhill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1412 in England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Henry Savile è nato il nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Sir John Savile e Isabel Eland. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Thornhill nel 1371, nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1412, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry SavileはイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドでSir John SavileとIsabel Elandの息子として生まれた。1371年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルでElizabeth de Thornhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1412年にイギリスイギリスで死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Savile(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 Sir John Savile(와)과 Isabel Eland의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1371년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 Elizabeth de Thornhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1412년 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Savile nasceu em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Sir John Savile e Isabel Eland. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Thornhill em 1371, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1412, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry Savile родился в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir John Savile и Isabel Eland. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Thornhill в 1371 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1412 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности Англия.

sm.from about 1362 to 1420: mai le e tusa o le 1362 e o'o I le 1420

es.lifeSummary: Henry Savile nació en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Sir John Savile y Isabel Eland. Se casó con Elizabeth de Thornhill en 1371, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1412, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
